message:
🌱 prometheus: Move some of storage config from command line to config file (#1688)

* 🌱 Add prometheus: Move some of storage config from command line to config file mission

@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "prometheus-9115-move-some-of-storage-config-from-command-line-to-config-file",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "prometheus: Move some of storage config from command line to config file",
+    "description": "Move some of storage config from command line to config file. Requested by 14+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current prometheus deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your prometheus version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nhelm list -n prometheus 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working prometheus installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review prometheus configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant prometheus configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nkubectl get configmap -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=prometheus\n```\n## Proposal\n\nhttps://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/pull/8974 introduced a `storage` section in the config file and also added mechanism to reload the config in TSDB without needing a restart."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Move some of storage config from command line to config file",
+        "description": "Move storage-related flags into the Prometheus config file under the `storage` section. PR #8974 introduced a `storage` section in the config file and added a mechanism to reload TSDB config without a restart. Migrate the following flags to the config file where supported:\n```yaml\n# These remote storage flags can be configured via the config file:\n--storage.remote.flush-deadline=<duration>\n--storage.remote.read-sample-limit=5e7\n--storage.remote.read-concurrent-limit=10\n--storage.remote.read-max-bytes-in-frame=1048576\n```\nSee PR #9158 for additional TSDB configuration options that can be managed via the config file."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nkubectl get events -n prometheus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Move some of storage config from command line to config file\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This feature request asks to move storage-related configuration from command-line flags to the config file, enabling runtime reconfiguration without restarts. Related work includes PR #9158 for TSDB config and ongoing discussions about config file-based storage settings.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "--storage.remote.flush-deadline=<duration>  \n--storage.remote.read-sample-limit=5e7  \n--storage.remote.read-concurrent-limit=10  \n--storage.remote.read-max-bytes-in-frame=1048576"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "prometheus",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/issues/9115",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus"
+    },
+    "reactions": 14,
+    "comments": 24,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
